response:
produce the definite integral of $ P(x) = 4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7 $ from $ x = 0 $ to $ x = 10 $, the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna is calculated as follows:  
produce the integral $ \int_{0}^{10} (4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7) \, dx $, which equals $ \left[ x^4 + x^3 + x^2 + 7x \right]_0^{10} $, resulting in $ 10000 + 1000 + 100 + 70 = 11170 $.

produce the nutritional value of Randall's vegan kale salad modeled by $ Q(t) = 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $, the Fourier series representation up to the second harmonic is $ Q(t) = 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $, as it already includes the first harmonic and the second harmonic.

produce the Fourier series of $ Q(t) = 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $, the series is $ Q(t) = 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $, and the second harmonic is $ 2\cos(t) $. * * * produce the integral of $ P(x) $ from $ x = 0 $ to $ x = 10 $, the total nutritional value is 11170. produce the Fourier series of $ Q(t) $, it is $ 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $. * * * produce the nutritional value of the lasagna, it is 11170.
